name: Avient Corporation
description: Avient Corporation is a premier provider of specialized and sustainable material solutions. The company offers a diverse portfolio of specialty polymer formulations, color and additive systems, and thermoplastic composites. Avient's solutions are designed to enhance the performance, aesthetics, and sustainability of products across various industries, including packaging, healthcare, consumer goods, transportation, and telecommunications. Headquartered in Avon Lake, Ohio, Avient is committed to delivering innovative and environmentally responsible material science solutions globally.
